commentary: Malinga bowls a yorker, Watson digs it out to deep midwicket and sprints back for two.

analyst.text: CSK requires 7 off 5. Malinga starts the final over. Shane Watson batting on 80. Win probability: CSK 65%.

scout.text: Malinga is targeting the yorker. Watson is deep in the crease. Scout advises fielders at deep square leg to be alert.

narrator.text: The grand master Lasith Malinga. The final over of the IPL. Shane Watson stands in his path.

psychologist.text: Psychological Telemetry: Shane Watson (47/100 pressure) maintains stable mental homeostasis. Lasith Malinga (51/100) Lasith Malinga is breathing calm, executing tactical plans with high focus.

commentary: Low full toss, Watson drives it to long-on for a single. Watson gets to 80 runs.

analyst.text: 6 off 4 needed. Scorecard: 144/5. Win probability: CSK 70%. Pressure index: 80.

scout.text: Watson drives to long-on. Malinga is varying his pace. Jadeja on strike must look for the gap.

narrator.text: A single. Watson jogs to the non-striker's end, exhausted but resolute. The championship is four balls away.

psychologist.text: Psychological Telemetry: Shane Watson (10/100 pressure) is in absolute psychological flow, reading the bowler with perfect clarity. Lasith Malinga (49/100) Lasith Malinga is breathing calm, executing tactical plans with high focus.

commentary: Jadeja flicks a full delivery to deep midwicket, they run hard and get two. 4 needed off 3.

analyst.text: CSK requires 4 off 3. Win probability rises to 78% for Chennai. MI is fading.

scout.text: I disagree. Rohit Sharma is instructing Malinga to bowl slower balls. Jadeja is eager to sweep; Malinga is baiting a leading edge.

narrator.text: A crucial moment in the match. The crowd is tense as the bowler prepares for the next delivery.

psychologist.text: Psychological Telemetry: Ravindra Jadeja (47/100 pressure) maintains stable mental homeostasis. Lasith Malinga (53/100) Lasith Malinga is breathing calm, executing tactical plans with high focus.

commentary: Slower delivery outside off, Jadeja steers it to deep cover for a single to put Watson back on strike.

analyst.text: 3 off 2. Jadeja singles. Watson returns to strike. Win probability: CSK 82%.

scout.text: Watson on 80. Malinga is likely to bowl a slower ball or yorker. Watson must clear his front leg to swing.

narrator.text: A single to cover. Watson takes strike. The crowd in Hyderabad is screaming. One hit to win.

psychologist.text: Psychological Telemetry: Ravindra Jadeja (10/100 pressure) is in absolute psychological flow, reading the bowler with perfect clarity. Lasith Malinga (49/100) Lasith Malinga is breathing calm, executing tactical plans with high focus.

commentary: RUN OUT! Shane Watson is gone! He taps it to deep point, runs for one, wants the second, but Krunal Pandya fires a perfect throw and de Kock whips the bails off! Watson falls on 80! Shardul Thakur comes in. 2 needed off 1!

analyst.text: Shane Watson run out on 80! Score: 148/6. Win probability swings to a dead heat: 50-50.

scout.text: CSK has the tactical disadvantage now. Shardul Thakur is vulnerable to yorkers. MI has fielders in the ring; no boundaries will be allowed.

narrator.text: A crucial moment in the match. The crowd is tense as the bowler prepares for the next delivery.
